info.title: GoBank API
info.description:
A production-grade banking API built with Go, gRPC, and gRPC-Gateway.

Supports user registration, authentication with access/refresh tokens (PASETO), multi-currency accounts, and atomic money transfers with deadlock-safe transactions.

post.description: Authenticates credentials and returns a PASETO access token and a refresh token. Store the refresh token securely — it is used to renew access tokens.

200.description: Authentication successful. Returns token pair and user info.

400.description: Bad Request — invalid input or missing required fields.

403.description: Forbidden — authenticated but not allowed to access this resource.

500.description: Internal Server Error — something went wrong on our end.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Username and email must be unique.

400.description: Bad Request — invalid input or missing required fields.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid Bearer token.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

500.description: Internal Server Error — something went wrong on our end.

username.description: Unique alphanumeric username. No spaces or special characters.
username.title:
Unique username. Alphanumeric only, no spaces.
example: "john.doe.abc1"

fullName.description: Full display name of the user.
fullName.title:
Full display name of the user.
example: "John Doe"

email.description: Valid email address. Must be unique across all accounts.
email.title:
Valid email address. Must be unique across all accounts.
example: "john@example.com"

password.description: Account password. Minimum 8 characters. Stored as bcrypt hash.
password.title:
Password for the account. Minimum 8 characters.
Stored as a bcrypt hash — never in plain text.
example: "supersecret123"

username.description: Username of the account to authenticate.

password.description: Account password. Transmitted securely over HTTPS.

sessionId.description: UUID of the session created for this login.

accessToken.description: Short-lived PASETO access token. Include as: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
accessToken.title: Short-lived PASETO access token. Include as: Authorization: Bearer <token>

accessTokenExpiresAt.description: UTC timestamp when the access token expires.

refreshToken.description: Long-lived refresh token. Store securely. Use at /v1/auth/renew_access to get a new access token.

refreshTokenExpiresAt.description: UTC timestamp when the refresh token expires. After this, the user must log in again.

user.description: Authenticated user's public profile. Password is never returned.

fullName.description: Full display name of the user.

passwordChangedAt.description: UTC timestamp of the last password change. Zero value means password was never changed.

createdAt.description: UTC timestamp when the account was created.

pbUser.description:
User represents the public profile of a GoBank account.
Sensitive fields (hashed_password) are never included.
